differentials.name: emphysematous pyelitis (gas in collecting system but not in parenchyma
differentials.raw: emphysematous pyelitis (gas in collecting system but not in parenchyma

context: extensive involvement of kidney + perinephric space | air extending through Gerota fascia into retroperitoneal space | occasionally gas in renal veins | signal void on T1WI + T2WI (DDx: renal calculi, rapidly flowing blood)
